title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 13-G.  OPELOUSAS COMMUNITY IMPROVEMENT ACT

§4720.101.  Short title

This Chapter shall be referred to as the "Opelousas Community Improvement Act".

Acts 2007, No. 380, §1, eff. July 10, 2007.
